provenance.text: If active dice remain in cup: player may roll again (return to Roll Phase). If all dice locked: forced stop, fire AllLocked triggers (Priest of the Dead, Spirit of the Dead, Burial Mask: gain +1 die at any value). Proceed to Claim Phase.
provenance.title: work:Continue or Stop Decision

provenance.text: One complete turn for the current player. Contains phases executed in sequence: StartOfTurn -> RollLoop -> ClaimPhase -> EndOfTurn. State: GameState.currentPlayer tracks who is active.
provenance.title: work:Player Turn

provenance.text: Check locked dice pyramid against level bar criteria. Player may claim ONE tile whose criteria are met. Cannot claim at a level where player already owns same-color tile. If no claim: gain 2 scarab tokens. Fire Acquire triggers on claimed tile. Code state: WaitingForPurchaseTile -> TilePurchaseChosen.
provenance.title: work:Claim Phase

provenance.text: Triggered when Queen is claimed. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED in code. Requires new game states beyond the current PlayerGameState enum.
provenance.title: work:Final Roll-Off

provenance.text: Pharaoh token holder wins. Tie-break: closest to Queen claimer's right. Display winner and final scores.
provenance.title: work:Victory

provenance.text: Initialize the turn. Add bonus dice from owned tiles to cup. Fire all StartOfTurn triggers. Code state: PlayerGameState.InitTurn -> ReadyToRollDice.
provenance.title: work:Start of Turn Phase

provenance.text: Player MUST lock at least 1 die. Immediate (white) dice auto-lock. Fire LockedAny triggers after each lock (Herder: locked pair -> +1 die). Code state: WaitingForLock.
provenance.title: work:Lock Phase

provenance.text: Repeats until the Queen is claimed and the final roll-off completes. Each round cycles through all players in clockwise order starting from the start player.
provenance.title: work:Round Loop

provenance.text: Optional. After locking, player may spend scarab tokens on active dice. Reroll token: reroll 1 active die. +1 Pip token: add 1 pip to 1 die. +1 Die token: add 1 standard die and roll it immediately.
provenance.title: work:Scarab Phase

provenance.text: Game loop state machine for Favor of the Pharaoh. Hierarchical SmartList organized from the perspective of play flow: what happens each tick, each player turn, each phase. This is the implementation-facing view that maps directly to code states and transitions.
provenance.title: work:FotP-GameLoop

provenance.text: Roll all dice currently in the cup. Fire AfterRoll triggers (Estate Overseer increment, Granary Master increment). Transition to lock phase. Code state: DiceHaveBeenRolled.
provenance.title: work:Roll Phase

provenance.text: One-time initialization before play begins. Place level bars, stack tiles, distribute starting dice and tokens, determine first player.
provenance.title: work:Game Setup

provenance.text: Return all dice to cup. Remove temporary/immediate dice. Reset per-turn flags (isUsedThisTurn, isUsedThisRoll, per-roll artifact states). Fire EndOfTurn triggers. Advance to next player. Code state: EndTurn -> WaitingNextTurn.
provenance.title: work:End of Turn Phase

provenance.text: Handle special post-claim effects that alter game flow. Extra turn tiles (Omen, Good Omen, Queen's Favor) cause player to take another turn instead of passing. Extra claim tiles (Secret Passage, Treasure, Royal Power) allow additional tile claims. Queen claim triggers roll-off setup.
provenance.title: work:Post-Claim Effects

provenance.text: Inner loop: Roll -> Lock -> Scarabs -> Decision. Repeats until player stops or all dice are locked. Code state: ReadyToRollDice -> DiceHaveBeenRolled -> WaitingForLock.
provenance.title: work:Roll Loop

provenance.text: GameState.currentPlayer = next player. Code: GameState.StartTurn().
provenance.title: work:Set Current Player

provenance.text: After Queen claim, finish current round then enter Final Roll-Off. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off]
provenance.title: work:Check Queen Claimed

provenance.text: Place 5 double-sided level bars (A/B side). [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-bar-criteria-a-side]
provenance.title: work:Place Level Bars

provenance.text: Take another turn, -1 standard die. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-3-tiles/10-children/omen-red-level-3]
provenance.title: work:Extra Turn - Omen

provenance.text: Youngest player gets Start Player tile, goes first. Clockwise order.
provenance.title: work:Determine Start Player

provenance.text: Voluntary stop with active dice remaining. DiceCup right-click or End Turn.
provenance.title: work:Player Stops Early

provenance.text: Queen claimer takes token, announces score. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-trigger]
provenance.title: work:Pharaoh Token Transfer

provenance.text: Claim up to 2 blue tiles. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-7-tiles/10-children/royal-power-red-level-7]
provenance.title: work:Extra Claims - Royal Power

provenance.text: Add 1 temp standard die, roll immediately. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/1-die-token]
provenance.title: work:Spend Die Token

provenance.text: No active dice -> proceed to Claim. Fire AllLocked triggers. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/continue-or-stop-decision]
provenance.title: work:All Locked - Must Stop

provenance.text: Next player clockwise. If round complete + Queen claimed -> Final Roll-Off.
provenance.title: work:Advance to Next Player

provenance.text: Roll again or proceed to claim. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/continue-or-stop-decision]
provenance.title: work:Continue or Stop

provenance.text: Herder: locked pair -> +1 die. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/lock-phase]
provenance.title: work:Fire LockedAny Triggers

provenance.text: Each player gets 1 final turn. Beat Pharaoh score to claim token. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-turns]
provenance.title: work:Roll-Off Turns

provenance.text: Add +1 pip, max die value. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/1-pip-token]
provenance.title: work:Spend Pip Token

provenance.text: Check locked dice vs level bars. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-claiming-rules/10-children/criteria-matching]
provenance.title: work:Evaluate Criteria

provenance.text: Some abilities are first-roll-only: Farmer, Worker, Soldier, Soothsayer, Artisan (1st roll pip).
provenance.title: work:Track Roll Number

provenance.text: Claim up to 2 level 3 tiles. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-6-tiles/10-children/secret-passage-red-level-6]
provenance.title: work:Extra Claims - Secret Passage

provenance.text: Show winning player, final score, tiles collected. NOT IMPLEMENTED.
provenance.title: work:Display Winner

provenance.text: Pharaoh holder wins. Tie-break: right of Queen claimer. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/determining-the-winner]
provenance.title: work:Determine Winner

provenance.text: Destroy temp dice (bIsTemporary flag). From +1 Die tokens, Charioteer, etc.
provenance.title: work:Remove Temporary Dice

provenance.text: TileAbility.Trigger.EndOfTurn. Bad Omen affects other players here.
provenance.title: work:Fire EndOfTurn Triggers

provenance.text: TileAbility.Trigger.Acquire. Some artifacts trigger immediately on acquire.
provenance.title: work:Fire Acquire Triggers

provenance.text: Add dice from owned tiles. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/roll-extra-dice-powers]
provenance.title: work:Add Bonus Dice to Cup

provenance.text: Active dice in cup -> return to Roll Phase. PlayerGameState.mayRollDice = true.
provenance.title: work:Roll Again

provenance.text: Split dice, claim 2 tiles. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-6-tiles/10-children/treasure-red-level-6]
provenance.title: work:Extra Claims - Treasure

provenance.text: Click active die -> PharoahDie.MoveToLockedArea(). Must lock >= 1 per roll.
provenance.title: work:Player Selects Die to Lock

provenance.text: Take Pharaoh, announce score, trigger roll-off. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-trigger]
provenance.title: work:Queen Claim - Trigger Roll-Off

provenance.text: Highlight valid tiles. Gray out unavailable. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-claiming-rules/10-children/claiming-restrictions]
provenance.title: work:Display Claimable Tiles

provenance.text: Cannot unlock previously-locked die. Cannot roll without locking new die.
provenance.title: work:Validate Lock Legality

provenance.text: Rematch, menu, etc. NOT IMPLEMENTED.
provenance.title: work:Game Over Options

provenance.text: Read face-up values. Custom dice trigger abilities. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/custom-dice-special-face-abilities]
provenance.title: work:Read Die Values

provenance.text: Reroll 1 active die. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/reroll-token]
provenance.title: work:Spend Reroll Token

provenance.text: White dice must lock immediately. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/dice-types-and-faces/10-children/immediate-die-white]
provenance.title: work:Auto-Lock Immediate Dice

provenance.text: Spend tokens on active dice. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system]
provenance.title: work:Optional Scarab Phase

provenance.text: PharoahDie.RollDiePhysics(). Wall colliders contain dice. Wait for Rigidbody.IsSleeping().
provenance.title: work:Roll Dice Physics

provenance.text: Physics roll all active dice. Code: DiceCup.OnMouseDown() -> PharoahDie.RollDie().
provenance.title: work:Roll All Dice in Cup

provenance.text: TileAbility.Trigger.StartOfTurn. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/start-of-turn]
provenance.title: work:Fire StartOfTurn Triggers

provenance.text: Remaining players get normal turns. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/round-completion]
provenance.title: work:Complete Current Round

provenance.text: Queen claimer's final attempt if Pharaoh was taken. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/queen-s-last-chance]
provenance.title: work:Queen's Last Chance

provenance.text: Take another turn, normal dice. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-4-tiles/10-children/good-omen-red-level-4]
provenance.title: work:Extra Turn - Good Omen

provenance.text: PharoahDie.ReadyToRoll() for each die. Move to InCupArea.
provenance.title: work:Return Dice to Cup

provenance.text: Place Pharaoh token on Queen tile (level 7). [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-7-tiles/10-children/queen-yellow-level-7]
provenance.title: work:Place Pharaoh on Queen

provenance.text: No claim -> 2 scarab tokens. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/scarab-token-system/10-children/gaining-tokens]
provenance.title: work:Pass - Gain 2 Tokens

provenance.text: StartOfTurn -> RollLoop -> ClaimPhase -> PostClaim -> EndOfTurn. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure]
provenance.title: work:Execute Turn Phases

provenance.text: Estate Overseer/Granary Master increment stored die. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/stored-die-powers-increment-per-roll]
provenance.title: work:Fire AfterRoll Triggers

provenance.text: Claim tile + extra turn. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/level-7-tiles/10-children/queen-s-favor-red-level-7]
provenance.title: work:Extra Turn - Queen's Favor

provenance.text: Clear isUsedThisTurn, isUsedThisRoll. Reset per-roll artifact states.
provenance.title: work:Reset Ability Flags

provenance.text: Clear isUsedThisTurn on all abilities. Reset diceLockedThisTurn = 0. Remove old temp dice.
provenance.title: work:Reset Per-Turn State

provenance.text: Stack tiles on bar slots. Tiles per stack = num_players - 1. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/game-setup/10-children/tile-stacks]
provenance.title: work:Stack Tiles on Bars

provenance.text: Players who missed a turn get +1 die token. NOT IMPLEMENTED. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/final-roll-off/10-children/roll-off-trigger]
provenance.title: work:Compensate Skipped Players

provenance.text: Priest of the Dead, Spirit of the Dead, Burial Mask: +1 die at any value. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/reroll-powers]
provenance.title: work:Fire AllLocked Triggers

provenance.text: PlayerBoard.ClaimTile() -> Instantiate(tile) -> add to tileList.
provenance.title: work:Claim One Tile

provenance.text: Must lock >= 1 die before other actions. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/player-turn-structure/10-children/lock-phase]
provenance.title: work:Enter Lock Phase

provenance.text: Each player takes a turn in clockwise order from start player. Repeat rounds.
provenance.title: work:Cycle Through Players

provenance.text: Use active tile abilities: adjust, reroll, lock. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/adjust-die-powers]
provenance.title: work:Activate Tile Powers

provenance.text: Each player: 1 pyramid, 3 standard dice, 1 reroll token. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/game-setup/10-children/player-setup]
provenance.title: work:Distribute Starting Gear

provenance.text: Omen/Good Omen/Queen's Favor -> player takes another turn. [ref:smartlist/execution-plan/fotp-rules-v20/10-children/tile-power-categories/10-children/extra-turn-powers]
provenance.title: work:Handle Extra Turn
